slides.heading: Introducing the PostNitro CLI
slides.description: Generate, brand, and schedule social carousels with a single command — built for AI agents and scripts.

slides.heading: One command, one carousel
slides.description: Hand it a topic and let PostNitro's AI do the rest. `postnitro carousel generate --context "5 remote work tips" --wait` returns a finished, on-brand carousel.

slides.heading: Everything the CLI does
slides.description: A full content pipeline, scriptable end to end.

content.title: AI Generate
content.description: Turn a topic, article, or X post into a carousel.

content.title: Import Slides
content.description: Bring your own content via --slides or --file.

content.title: Brand Kits
content.description: Stamp your logo, name, and handle automatically.

content.title: Schedule
content.description: Queue posts to LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok & Threads.

content.title: Generate + Schedule
content.description: One command from prompt to scheduled post.

content.title: JSON Everywhere
content.description: Every response is clean JSON — pipe it anywhere.

slides.heading: Made for automation
slides.description: JSON on stdout for success, JSON on stderr for errors, and predictable exit codes. No colors or tables to strip — safe to parse from any agent or shell script.

slides.heading: Ship your first carousel today
slides.description: Install the CLI and generate a carousel in under a minute.
